params.data: Analyze arithmetic operations including addition (25.75 + 13.46), subtraction (87.5 - 32.99), multiplication (12 × 15.625), and division (98.7 ÷ 0.8375 with rounding)
Analyze linear (2x + 7 = 17), quadratic (3x² - 2x - 1 = 0), and system of equations (x + 2y = 5, 3x - y = 13) with solutions and verification steps
Analyze basic trigonometry (sin(45°)), inverse trigonometry (arcsin(0.5)), and Pythagorean theorem (13², 5², 12² verification)
Analyze differentiation (f(x) = 3x³ - 2x² + 5x - 7) using the power rule, integration (∫4x² + 3x + 2 dx), and chain rule for composite functions (sin(x²))
Analyze dataset statistics (dataset: [12, 14, 16, 18, 20, 22, 25, 28]) for mean, median, mode, range, and standard deviation with verification
Solve geometry (rectangle perimeter), proportion (paint coverage), percentage (original price), and exponents (2⁵ + 3³ - 4²) with step-by-step verification
Solve magic square (fill 'X' in 3x3 grid) and compute (24*3² - 7³)/15 + 5(6² - 4)² with algebraic and arithmetic verification steps
